mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rn, TB.* FROM ( SELECT /*selectInsuranceList*/ A.INS_CPY ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='INSCPY' AND CODE=A.INS_CPY) AS INS_CPY_NM ,A.CTFC_NUM ,A.CTT_NM ,A.CTT_USER ,A.STATS ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='STATS' AND CODE=A.STATS) AS STATS_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.CTT_START_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CTT_START_DATE ,A.PAY_PEOD ,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(CTT_START_DATE, A.PAY_PEOD*12),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CTT_END_DATE ,A.TNSF_DATE ,A.INS_AMT ,A.BANK ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='BANK' AND CODE=A.BANK) AS BANK_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.TMNT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TMNT_DATE ,A.ETC ,A.MANAGER ,A.PHONE_NUM ,A.ATCH_FILE_ID ,TO_CHAR(A.UPD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPD_DATE ,TO_CHAR(A.REG_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM INSURANCE_CONTRACT A WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY A.CTT_START_DATE ) TB ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{firstIndex} + 1 AND #{firstIndex} + #{recordCountPerPage}
SELECT /*selectInsuranceListTotCnt*/ COUNT(A.INS_CPY) AS CNT FROM INSURANCE_CONTRACT A WHERE 1=1

SELECT /*selectMyInsuranceDetail*/ A.INS_CPY ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='INSCPY' AND CODE=A.INS_CPY) AS INS_CPY_NM ,A.CTFC_NUM ,A.CTT_NM ,A.CTT_USER ,A.STATS ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='STATS' AND CODE=A.STATS) AS STATS_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.CTT_START_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CTT_START_DATE ,A.PAY_PEOD ,TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(CTT_START_DATE, A.PAY_PEOD*12),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CTT_END_DATE ,A.TNSF_DATE ,A.INS_AMT ,A.BANK ,(SELECT CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE USE_AT='Y' AND CODE_ID='BANK' AND CODE=A.BANK) AS BANK_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.TMNT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TMNT_DATE ,A.ETC ,A.MANAGER ,A.PHONE_NUM ,A.ATCH_FILE_ID ,TO_CHAR(A.UPD_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPD_DATE ,TO_CHAR(A.REG_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DATE FROM INSURANCE_CONTRACT A WHERE 1=1 AND A.INS_CPY = #{insCpy} AND A.CTFC_NUM = #{ctfcNum}
